summary: UX navigation, dark design docs, production demo exclusion, and regression coverage verification passed.

commands.command: npx biome check components/DepartmentNav.tsx 'app/(app)/compliance/page.tsx' 'app/(app)/packages/page.tsx' docs/planning/05-design-system.md docs/planning/06-tasks.md specs/screens/index.yaml tests/ux-navigation-contract.test.ts

adversarialEvidence: Production navigation and compliance entry points do not expose /packages/demo.
Settings is absent from sidebar/compliance body and remains header-routed by contract.
/packages is a persisted-data-backed index using listContentPackages(null).
Unknown package progress renders as 미측정 rather than a fake 0%.
Department navigation prefix matching is segment-safe.
Dark command-center design tokens are documented and tested against app/globals.css.
